title: Stocks At New Highs: Industrial Supplier Soars On Earnings

title: W.W. Grainger (GWW) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: W.W. Grainger (GWW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.99% and 3.06%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
